results.name: latency_regression_after_deployment
results.actual_root_cause: Likely performance regression introduced by recent search-service deployment v2.3.1, deployed 20 minutes before the latency alert. The deployment correlates with P95 latency increasing to 2500 ms, elevated error rate of 0.15, and service health showing only 2 of 3 instances healthy.

results.name: payment_service_startup_failure
results.actual_root_cause: payment-service pods are failing to start because the application is using invalid database credentials, likely due to a recent secret rotation issue.

results.name: cpu_spike
results.actual_root_cause: High CPU usage on analytics-service is likely caused by recent production deployment v2.3.1, which occurred 20 minutes ago and closely correlates with CPU exceeding 90% for 15 minutes.

results.name: memory_pressure
results.actual_root_cause: inventory-service is experiencing Java heap space exhaustion, causing containers to be OOMKilled and driving memory utilization to 94%.
